title: Blockprint Graphic
description: Ce style imite la linogravure ou la gravure sur bois traditionnelle à l'aide de graphiques vectoriels nets et épais. Il se caractérise par un contraste extrême, des palettes de couleurs plates et des silhouettes épaisses et ondulantes dont les détails internes sont strictement sculptés à l'aide d'espaces négatifs, de marques de gouge et de pointillés. Le résultat est une esthétique audacieuse, organique et sculptée à la main avec des bords numériques parfaitement nets.
description_en: This style mimics traditional linocut or woodblock printing using clean, heavy vector graphics. It features extreme high-contrast, flat color palettes, and thick, undulating silhouettes with internal details strictly carved out using negative space, gouge marks, and stippling. The result is a bold, organic, hand-carved aesthetic with perfectly sharp digital edges.
description_fr: Ce style imite la linogravure ou la gravure sur bois traditionnelle à l'aide de graphiques vectoriels nets et épais. Il se caractérise par un contraste extrême, des palettes de couleurs plates et des silhouettes épaisses et ondulantes dont les détails internes sont strictement sculptés à l'aide d'espaces négatifs, de marques de gouge et de pointillés. Le résultat est une esthétique audacieuse, organique et sculptée à la main avec des bords numériques parfaitement nets.
prompt: Digital vector illustration mimicking traditional linocut and woodblock print carving. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering utilizes a stark, flat palette featuring {{primary_color}} as the heavy, dominant solid ink mass. Details and highlights are carved out to reveal {{secondary_color}} and {{accent_color}}. The linework consists of extremely thick, undulating, organic silhouettes. Forms are constructed from dense, chunky blocks of color. Internal textures and shading are achieved strictly through subtractive negative space: short gouge marks, irregular stippled dots, and jagged hatching lines cut sharply into the main shapes. The spatial dynamics are strictly flat 2D with zero gradients, soft shading, or subsurface scattering; all depth is flattened into high-contrast graphic planes. Edges are razor-sharp and vector-clean, yet deliberately irregular and wobbly to simulate the resistance of carving linoleum. The visual rhythm is meandering and serpentine, bending in fluid yet jagged curves. Text, if present, must match this hand-carved, uneven block-lettering style. The atmosphere is bold and heavily stylized, reminiscent of modern apparel graphics drawing on tribal printmaking traditions. Materiality is conveyed purely through the geometry of the cuts without digital noise. Every object is reduced to elemental silhouettes, stylized into interlocking masses of solid ink. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. tags: vector illustration, linocut, woodblock print, high contrast, negative space carving, chunky lines, flat colors, gouge marks, graphic apparel design, solid ink, subtractive drawing, tribal motif, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A flat, graphic environment mimicking a traditional linocut or block print backdrop. Large, sweeping, undulating planes of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}} form the landscape or abstract spatial elements. Textures are created entirely through subtractive negative space carving: large gouge marks, irregular stippled dots, and jagged hatching lines revealing {{accent_color}} underneath. The spatial dynamics are completely flat 2D, with absolutely no gradients, soft shading, or lighting effects. The visual rhythm features meandering, serpentine curves and thick, chunky abstract silhouettes that interlock like carved puzzle pieces. Edges are razor-sharp but organically wobbly, simulating the resistance of carved linoleum. The overall atmosphere is stark, bold, and heavily stylized.

The visual rhythm features meandering, serpentine curves and thick, chunky abstract silhouettes that interlock like carved puzzle pieces. A decorative foreground frame composed of thick, carved, undulating tribal-inspired border elements and ink-splatter vignettes sits in front of the invisible subject to create a sense of layered depth. These framing elements and the background scene transition starkly into the flat {{background_color}} surface, with the jagged, block-printed edges interacting directly with the {{background_color}}.
